philippines.title: Basak Pardo shooting: Police hunt gunman in fatal attack
philippines.description:
CEBU CITY, Philippines — Police are continuing their search for an unidentified gunman who shot dead a 32-year-old man while he was visiting acquaintances in Barangay Basak Pardo, Cebu City on Saturday afternoon, June 20. Authorities identified the victim as Reggie Apostol, 32, a resident of Sitio Soran in Barangay Kinasang-an Pardo. Responding police officers from Inayawan Police Station found Apostol sprawled on the ground after the shooting, which occurred around 3 p.m. in Sitio Kauswagan. READ ALSO: Guadalupe fatal shooting: 1 nabbed for luring victim, 2 gunmen hunted He sustained gunshot wounds to the head from a still undetermined […]...
Keep on reading: Basak Pardo shooting: Police hunt gunman in fatal attack

energy.title: G7 Takes Aim at China’s Grip on Critical Minerals
energy.description: The leaders of the G7 have created a strategic alliance on critical minerals in a coordinated effort to break China’s oversized control of the metals and minerals and rare earth elements crucial to the defense, automotive, and clean energy industries. energy.title: Energy Security, Not Climate Goals, Is Now Driving the Clean Power Boom
energy.description: While ships are beginning to trickle through the Strait of Hormuz after months of near-total closure, it will be a very long time before the effects of this year’s energy crisis fade from the global economy – if they ever do. This latest round of turmoil in global oil and gas markets has catalyzed clean energy adoption to a degree that may permanently alter the global energy landscape, as well as the way that we conceive of energy security and geopolitical strategy.
